description: Allows the psycheros daemon origin (loaded when the Tauri webview navigates to http://localhost:<port>) to invoke the native mic-capture plugin's commands. macOS-only — the driving use case is Tahoe's WKWebView not exposing navigator.mediaDevices, which forces the launcher to ship a native AVAudioEngine capture plugin. Windows WebView2 and Linux webkit2gtk handle getUserMedia via the normal browser flow, so this capability is gated to macOS to avoid widening their attack surface.
